title: RSRP
description: A very very bare bones resource pack that makes things slightly prettier without conflict with other packs.
body:
A very simple resource pack meant to make things look a bit prettier.
#
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K4UnZRXi/images/3b7d13556ec937db002537eb0435a8914d470e39.webp)
#
Uses vanilla shader methods to adjust the fog and sky, and the intensity of the shadows to give everything a softer feel. The foliage has also been changed to be closer to that of Alpha versions of the game, which looks more vibrant.
#
